rationale: Review 1 directly addresses the placement rubric: the file is verifiably placed in AlgebraicGroup/ despite containing only bialgebra/Hopf algebra declarations with no algebraic-geometry infrastructure, and splitting it into Bialgebra/ and HopfAlgebra/ subdirectories would genuinely improve module organization. Review 2's findings (missing library-root import, unused TensorProduct open) are real but concern integration and cleanup rather than structural placement.
